// CAPABILITY: HOOKS + MCP: This file configures both lifecycle hooks and MCP server connections. Hooks are shell commands that fire on Claude Code events. MCP servers extend Claude with external tools.

nexus-platform.// description: Custom MCP server — the main educational artifact. Shows how to build your own MCP server. See mcp-servers/nexus-platform/

github.// description: Official GitHub MCP server. Provides PR creation, issue management, code review tools.

postgres.// description: Official Postgres MCP server. Allows Claude to query workflow state and service databases directly.

hooks.// CAPABILITY: HOOKS: Hooks fire on Claude Code lifecycle events. Each hook is a shell command. See .claude/hooks/ for the scripts.

PreToolUse.// purpose: Block dangerous shell commands before they run. Stops rm -rf, kubectl delete on prod, DROP TABLE, etc.

PostToolUse.// purpose: Auto-lint and typecheck edited files. Keeps code quality without manual intervention.
When a Bash command exits with a non-zero code that looks like a test run, trigger the debug agent.

Stop.// purpose: On session end, summarize architectural decisions made and write them to session memory log.
